name: desktop-code-assistant
author: Adam F
description: System-wide educational code assistant with overlay capture and floating explanation bubbles.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/services/config.js && node --check src/services/ocr.js && node --check src/services/windows-accessibility.js && node --check src/services/explainer.js && node --check src/renderer/control.js && node --check src/renderer/overlay.js && node --check src/renderer/bubble.js
